text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ah, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ryan, Bright! Are you warming up for practice?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Yes. The Hanshin Daishoten is fast approaching, so I must prepare.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Isn't Spe also participating in that race?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, as a warm-up to the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we'll finally get to see what the Golden Generation's
Derby Umamusume is made of.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I happened to watch her last race. Her form was most impressive.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
However... This is not the time to focus on my opponents. I must hone
my own senses and skills.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: True, Bright here is the winner of last year's Hanshin Daishoten and spring Tenno Sho, after all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: And as champion, I must demonstrate that my victory was inevitable.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Well, you certainly have the mindset of a champion down.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Anyway, we should get to training. See ya later, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Have a lovely day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Trainer, Special Week... Your opponent shows no signs of weakness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week's next race steadily approaches. We should be
perfecting our strategy and fine-tuning her form by now, but...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: A little run like that doesn't usually tire you out.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: S-sorry...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Why don't you take a break and try again? Practice makes power,
right? Or, you know, something like that!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Right, that sounds good...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her mind constantly on Silence Suzuka, Special Week hasn't
been able to concentrate on practice at all.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Trainer? Pardon the intrusion.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Tazuna? Can I help you with something?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
You can. Twinkle Monthly would like to speak with you. It seems they
want to run a special feature on Team Sirius.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Whoa-ho-HO! Twinkle Monthly sure has some GREAT taste!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: A special feature on us? That'd be amazing!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, they also gave us a survey for your team members to fill out. I'll
be sure to send that to your office.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Thank you, I really appreciate it.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
And one more thing... There's a former trainer with overseas
experience visiting the academy.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I happened to mention Silence Suzuka, and they seemed interested in
seeing her run today.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: That would be super helpful. I'd love to get some insight.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Well, Suzuka? What do you think? Want to show off a bit to this
trainer?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, Spe?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah, um, uh... sorry, never mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The trainer Tazuna mentioned has come to observe Silence Suzuka, so
I'm currently having her show off her skills.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head to the stands to watch over them and find Special Week
likewise staring at Silence Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: So this is where you were.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: So this is where you were.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, I don't know what came over me. I can't believe I almost
tried to stop Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
No, I understand. You and Suzuka have been together ever since you
entered the academy.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
No, I understand. You and Suzuka have been together ever since you
entered the academy.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...I still remember that day so clearly—the day I first saw Suzuka run.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'd just arrived from Hokkaido. Just as I was starting to worry I'd made
a mistake coming here, I saw her.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: The way she ran was just so awe-inspiring. I couldn't look away.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ever since then, I've watched her run, hoping I could run like that...
someday...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Special Week trails off, leaving us both standing in silence.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure even she wasn't aware of just how much motivation she got
from watching Silence Suzuka run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As I watch Silence Suzuka run down the track...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I remember the first time I saw her run. She looked like she was
having so much fun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before long, she found her own running style, and the more people
saw her run, the more expectations for her swelled.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Spe... you said you want to run like Suzuka, correct?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Yes.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: So, what exactly is it that you love about her running?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Isn't it obvious? I mean, it's so... pretty and cool...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
And it makes you dream, doesn't it? You can't help but wonder what
her next race will be like.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yes, exactly! And every single time, she just blows you away!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want to see her race again and again! Like at the Osaka
Hai! Or maybe a second Takarazuka Kinen win! Or maybe—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Seeking out new scenery is Suzuka's dream.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
When she runs, that's what she's chasing. And that steadfast drive of
hers is what we fell in love with.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
When she runs, that's what she's chasing. And that steadfast drive of
hers is what we fell in love with.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
But you know... once she goes abroad, I think we'll see a run we love
even more.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
But you know... once she goes abroad, I think we'll see a run we love
even more.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You're right... In fact, I'm sure of it!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Suzuka's running will take her farther than ever before! Farther than anything we could ever imagine!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That's what I love about her running... If I tried to stop her, it wouldn't
be the same anymore!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
And if you want to run like her—to catch up to her—then you'll need
to work hard.
choice_data_list: Let's make you the best racer in Japan!
Let's make you the best racer in Japan!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
And if you want to run like her—to catch up to her—then you'll need
to work hard.
choice_data_list: Let's make you the best racer in Japan!
Let's make you the best racer in Japan!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Right!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The stands are packed here at the Hanshin Racecourse, and every
moment that ticks by just makes the crowd more excited for the race
to come!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And two of the favorites to win are the Golden Generation's Special
Week and last year's champion Mejiro Bright!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Here at the Hanshin Daishoten, they will clash for the very first time!
Just who will come out on top?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Rain means a muddy track... I'll need to be extra careful to not use
too much stamina. Don't wanna overdo it in the beginning.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Good, keep thinking like that. The weather will slow down the pace,
so you should be able to sit near the front.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Right, okay... I've got this!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The 3,000-meter course at Hanshin has a short stretch with an uphill.
Once you hit the third corner, turn on the gas!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Um... I can't tell if you're being serious, or if you're messing with me...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The hell ya mean?! You can't spell Hanshin Daishoten without "Gold
Ship!"

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Instead of spouting your nonsense, focus on making your debut!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Still, what rotten luck. I can't believe Suzuka's flight was scheduled
for the same time as the race...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah, actually, that was my idea. I wanted her to leave today.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
If Suzuka's going to run overseas worry-free... I need to show her that
I can win, even if she's not by my side!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Is that so? Well then, you better seize victory in today's race.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Yeah, you've got all of us behind you today. Make us proud.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Yeah, you've got all of us behind you today. Make us proud.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Okay, you got it!
